creator: baiazid@gmail.com
text:
If I open ssh session with putty for example and run a command which will generate a lot of output (ex: compile something, or man ping and use pg-up and pg-down, or portsnap extract ...), session hangs.

I reproduced this on 3 servers (all diff hardware). Local console commands will work perfectly, but will hang over ssh.

Fix: 

working on it :)
